reviews.text: Sam was absolutely phenomenal! The images she took are unbelievable. She captured the day beyond anything we could have imagined—every landscape, moment, and detail was preserved beautifully. She was so flexible and easy to work with throughout the entire planning process, even though we threw a funky schedule at her. We’re endlessly grateful for Sam and everything she did to capture our wedding day!

Sam might be one of the kindest humans on this planet. My now husband and I found her by happenstance on Instagram and instantly fell in love with her photography. We set up a meeting with her to talk about what an elopement would look like, and talk about open dates. Sam made the process so easy. She provided a list of local vendors, that she had previously worked with and recommended. She provided a whole presentation on different locations we could go to on an adventure elopement, and then helped us narrow it down to accommodate parents with some mobility limitations. On the day of the elopement she was a calm, steady presence that made the day perfect. It wasn’t like you had a photographer taking photos of you, it was more like you were hanging out with a friend. She drove us to our different adventure locations, took the most amazing photos, and made us feel comfortable while doing so. Sam had our sneak peek photos to us within the week, and I was blown away by how good every single one of them was. I highly recommend Sam if you are getting married in Colorado, or just looking for some family photos!

We had the absolute best experience with Sam and her husband Cole for our wedding on October 4th! Sam is truly one of the kindest souls — she has such a calming presence and somehow managed to keep me completely sane through the entire day. She knew exactly what to say and do to make everything feel easy and natural.

Her attention to detail blew me away. She noticed every little moment — the small looks, happy tears, and in-between laughs that made our day so special. Sam and Cole worked together perfectly and were such a joy to have around. They made us feel comfortable, relaxed, and genuinely cared for.

When we got our photos back, I was honestly speechless. Every picture felt like it told a piece of our story, and I could feel all the emotions of the day all over again. I can’t recommend Sam and Cole enough — they’re not only incredibly talented photographers, but just wonderful people. We’re so grateful they were part of our wedding day!

We first met Sam while in Ridgeway at my best friends wedding and after that we knew we wanted to use her for our own wedding in the future.  We were lucky enough to be able to book Sam well in advance and we couldn’t have made a better decision looking back!  Sam not only photographed our wedding but literally helped us set up an absolutely perfect adventure wedding day for me, my wife, and our group of close friends and family.  We had many phone calls, she set up an awesome slideshow presentation with a voice over that showed us tons of spots to pick from.  She really does it all and we couldn’t have had the perfect wedding day we did without Sam’s assistance and knowledge of the area.  She made everyone, my wife especially, feel so so comfortable and natural which made the day so fun and the pictures turn out that much better!  Her vision is unmatched, her energy is like no other, she’s a fantastic photographer and we really couldn’t say enough good things about her!  If you are thinking about using Sam for anything, 10/10 recommend.

We hired her as our wedding photographer and I think we made a lifetime friend, couldn’t be happier!

I don't even know where to start with this review - Sam is AMAZING (and I'm not bias just because we share the same first name). We did a destination micro-wedding (~20 guests) and had a vision that after our small ceremony we would get into the mountains and capture some adventure photos (just the two of us). Sam listened to our vision and even sent over a digital guide so we could better visualize each of the different locations she was suggesting. Fast forward to wedding day - and she was the absolute best! All of our family and friends loved her. She kept the day light and fun for everyone! During our adventure portion we took to the dirt roads and she found the most incredible backdrop for our photos! I think the biggest take away is if you want to have FUN taking photos (and not feel stiff and awkward) then she is your photographer. When we got our sneak peaks back we were truly blown away, they were better than we ever could have imagined and I think that is not only a testament to her creative skill behind the lens but that she allowed us the space to just relax and be ourselves!
